Villa Condulmer Hotel
properties.note: Villa Condulmer is a 5-star hotel surrounded by the greenery of a huge park. It was build in 1743, there are many original frescoes, Giuseppe Verdi's piano. In the same building there is a church and Conte Alvise Restaurant.
